## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:

## Design Note

- [ ] Not needed (change is trivial or outside critical modules)
- [ ] Added under `docs/design-notes/` (required for non-trivial critical-module changes)

## Mandatory Checklist

- [ ] API contract reviewed
- [ ] Error paths reviewed
- [ ] Memory ownership (`new/take/borrow`) reviewed
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Security impact reviewed
- [ ] Performance impact reviewed
